Off Calendar Jul-26-2006 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARENCES BY C. HAIG, PETITIONER AND JOHN JANIGIAN, HIER.
THE 8/30/03 WILL CAN NOT BE SUBMITTED AS HOLOGRAPHIC DUE TO THE FACT THAT THE WILL IS PARTIALLY TYPED AND HAND WRITTEN. AND THE WILL HAS NO WITNESSES. NOTICE WAS NOT SUFFICIENT.
NEW PETITION SHOULD BE FILED. THIS PETITION IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR.
JUDGE:JOHN DEARMAN, CLERK:LARRISA DOTSON, RPTR.:CHRISTINA PAXTON
